title: [AI-assisted] fix(gateway/telegram): tighten Telegram webhook validator and OAuth2 audience checks
summary: Reject malformed Telegram webhook updates with missing or unexpected fields in a backwards-compatible way.
Add explicit OAuth2 token audience and issuer checks for gateway webhook flows to prevent token reuse across providers.
why: Webhook validator accepted structurally invalid updates leading to noisy downstream errors and potential bypass of handler selection.
OAuth2 tokens were validated for signature and expiry but lacked audience/issuer constraints in gateway flows, increasing risk of confused-deputy scenarios.
